topIssues: Frame 1: Low contrast on row IDs (e.g., 'r_rev') and '+ add' placeholders makes them difficult to read against the dark background.
Frame 2: The orange input border feels unpolished and lacks cohesive styling with the rest of the dark UI.
Frame 3: The green text inside the variance badge has poor contrast against the dark green pill background.
fixSuggestions: Increase the contrast of the row IDs and placeholder text to improve overall readability.
Replace the harsh orange input border with a subtler, brand-consistent focus ring.
Adjust the badge colors in Frame 3 to ensure the text meets accessibility standards.
